ddls:
CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company posting the job */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the job (e.g., mobile development, software engineering) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job */,
  "skills" TEXT /* Required skills for the job */,
  "qualifications" TEXT /* Required qualifications for the job */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the job */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the job posting */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the job */,
  "experience_required" TEXT /* Years of experience required */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Application deadline */,
  "recruiter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recruiter managing the job posting */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of job (e.g., full-time, part-time, internship) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_recruiter_id FOREIGN KEY ("recruiter_id") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL for a category icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "skills" TEXT /* Skills of the candidate */,
  "qualifications" TEXT /* Qualifications of the candidate */,
  "resume" TEXT /* Resume of the candidate */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the candidate */,
  "portfolio_url" TEXT /* URL for the candidate's portfolio */,
  "linkedin_url" TEXT /* URL for the candidate's LinkedIn profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job being applied for */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate applying for the job */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "date_applied" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "cover_letter" TEXT /* Content of the candidate's cover letter */,
  "application_resume" TEXT /* Filename of the candidate's resume */,
  "recruiter_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the recruiter about the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recruiters" (
  "recruiter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recruiter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the recruiter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the recruiter */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the recruiter */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the recruiter (e.g., senior recruiter, junior recruiter) */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the recruiter was hired */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recruiter's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recruiter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_companies" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the client company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the client company */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the client company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the client company operates in */,
  "website" TEXT /* Client company's website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the client company was founded */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the client company (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the contact (e.g., CEO, HR Manager) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the contact joined the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_posting_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job posting */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job posting (e.g., open, closed, filled) */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "recruiter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recruiter who updated the status */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_posting_status_recruiter_id FOREIGN KEY ("recruiter_id") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_posting_status_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "recruiter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recruiter who updated the status */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_status_recruiter_id FOREIGN KEY ("recruiter_id") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_status_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviews" (
  "interview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interview */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the interview */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the interview */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the interview */,
  "interviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the interviewer */,
  "interview_type" TEXT /* Type of interview (e.g., phone, in-person, video) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_interviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("interviewer_id") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sender (recruiter or candidate) */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the receiver (recruiter or candidate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the email */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the email */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the email was sent */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sender (recruiter or system) */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the receiver (candidate or client contact) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_notifications_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_notifications_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_notifications_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)
